verse_text: And the Lord Almighty replied to the angel who was speaking to me with kind and comforting words.

pericope.title: The Vision of the Four Horses

links.context: With the Lamb's opening of the seals, John begins a description of the signs of the end, much of it already set forth by Jesus in the Gospels (Mt 24; Mk 13; Lk 21). The seals are consequences of man's condition, an overview of conditions manifest since the birth of the Church, which will continue until Christ's second coming. The four horsemen (see [[ZEC.1:8]]-17; 6:1-8 for the model of this imagery) personify the scourges which, through the prophets, God has threatened as judgment on the faithless: war, famine, plague, natural disasters.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
